description: Case diameter: 35 mm Case thickness: 8 mmDial shape: RoundWarranty: 1yrFibre case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortBlack fibre strap with a tang clasp for comfort and styleGrey dial with branding at the 6 hour mark and brand logo at the 12 hour mark Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 30 meters allowing you to use it when washing your hands or in light rain
